mentions.note: Down 60% from all-time high; BDC redemption gating, suspensions, and controversial asset sales raise concerns about private credit health; Cramer is 'a seller, not a buyer of fraught situations.'
Private credit concerns emerging; may not be ready for scrutiny; geopolitical and rate volatility pressuring credit markets.
Highest-risk private credit firm; can't short because if loans truly solid they can sell at par (95+) to meet redemptions. Must prove portfolio quality; silence invites shorting. Don't buy stock.
Prefer Blackstone in private credit space; BX has 5% yield and better management.
Private equity investor; participating in data center construction and infrastructure buildout.
Business development company model. Won't recommend BDCs; opaque holdings and weak historical track record make them unsuitable despite headline yields.
Too risky despite private equity narrative reversal; prefer Blackstone for exposure with better risk profile.
